subject:
Cannot press finish button for create species when deselecting some
 data sources
body:
Hi Dimitry, I'm now trying to use M to refine three data sets together. 
These three data sets were collected on three different sessions. When I 
try to create species, an ambiguous file name error pops up. I followed the 
instruction on the website and did the following thing in attempt to bypass 
this problem.

1.All my rlnmicrographnames has the following format:stack_????.mrcs. My 
guess is that different micrographs with the same micrograph number from 
data collected on different sessions is what's causing the problem, so I 
manually split the combined data set according to the session they were 
collected on in to three subset of particle stars so that microgaraph 
number is unique within each subset. 
2.I selected one of the subset stars in the create species menu and 
deactivated the other two irrelevant data sources. After this step the 
particle number shown on the create species menu is as expected and no more 
ambiguous file name error shows up.
3.However, at this stage, the finish button on the create species menu 
remains gray and cannot be clicked on. To see whether my splitting is 
what's causing the problem, I deleted the two irrelevant data sources and 
retried to create the species, this time, the finish button can be clicked 
on and create species is successful with the correct particle number. 

Could you give some advice on how to solve this issue?
Many thanks in advance!
Gaoxing
